intro.change_reason: Fixed typographical concatenation of name and email, and added line break for clarity.

summary.original_text: Fashion professional with 3+ years of experience in buying, merchandising, category management, and P&L managementacross retail and e-commerce. Experienced in assortment planning, vendor sourcing, PO/PI coordination, and productlifecycle execution for apparel categories including bottom-wear, casualwear, and accessories. Proven ability to analyzesales performance, optimize assortments, negotiate supplier terms, and improve margins and sell-through across multi-channel retail environments.
summary.rewritten_text: Results-driven fashion merchandising and buying professional with 3+ years of experience owning P&L, managing OTB, and driving assortment planning and vendor negotiation for womenswear and multi-category apparel. Proven track record of improving margins and sell-through across omnichannel retail, with hands-on expertise in SAP, PO management, and cross-functional collaboration. Analytical and entrepreneurial, with a focus on scaling categories and delivering measurable business growth.
summary.change_reason: Rewritten to align with tone guidance, allowed claims, and role keywords while preserving original message.
claims_added: Expertise in assortment planning and category management
Proven vendor negotiation and PO management skills

professional_experience.original_text:
SuperK Bangalore, IndiaCategory Manager – Fashion Nov 2025 – PresentBuilt the fashion category from near zero across online channels and a tech-enabled retail network of 3+ coco stores,launching assortments across apparel, footwear, and accessories while driving vendor expansion, category P&Lmanagement, and data-led merchandising decisions.



- Expanded the fashion assortment from 5 to 25+ subcategories across menswear, womenswear, kidswear,footwear, and accessories by onboarding 12+ regional vendors, identifying assortment gaps, and benchmarkingcategory offerings against value retail players like DMart and Vishal Mega Mart.
- Analyzed weekly sales performance, pricing benchmarks, and customer demand signals thereby generating ₹ 3.5lakh in category revenue within two months.
- Negotiated vendor pricing, MOQs, and sourcing terms, improving product margins from 22% to 35% whilemaintaining competitive retail pricing.
- Partnered with marketing teams to launch fashion-led campaigns during New Year, Pongal and Republic Dayincreasing category visibility by ~22% and driving ~15% uplift in campaign period sales.
- Collaborated with operations and supply chain teams to improve stock availability for fast-moving SKUs,coordinating warehouse invoicing and inventory flow to reduce stock-outs by ~20% across priority products.
- Utilized Excel and Metabase dashboards for tracking sell-through, AOV, and margin performance; identifiedunderperforming SKUs and implemented assortment rationalization that improved category gross margin by ~6%.The Style Gram Founder Remote - Chennai, IndiaNov 2024 – Jun 2025Built and operated a lean fashion reselling brand focused on affordable women’s western-wear, managing end-to-endsourcing, merchandising, content creation, and customer engagement across Instagram and Swiggy Minis.
- Generated ₹50,000 in revenue during the launch phase with an average order value of ₹600, fulfilling 80+customer orders across Tier 1 and Tier 2 cities with zero product returns.
- Sourced and merchandised 60+ SKUs across tops, skirts, and dresses through direct supplier negotiations,maintaining 45% gross margins and reducing sourcing turnaround time by 25%.
- Evaluated and engaged 5 supplier partners before finalizing a primary vendor to optimize pricing, qualityconsistency, and procurement turnaround time.
- Executed pricing, merchandising, and inventory tracking through Excel-based systems, ensuring 100% orderfulfillment and streamlined stock management.
- Managed 60+ SKUs on Swiggy Minis and built a custom Excel-based WIP tracker to manage catalog listings,order tracking, and inventory visibility, reducing catalog errors by 90% and improving stock flow for fast-sellingstyles.
- Produced 25+ branded content assets and launched 3+ Instagram ad campaigns, improving click-through ratesby 22% through A/B testing and targeted messaging.Go Colors (Go Fashion India Ltd.) Assistant Fashion Manager Chennai, IndiaSept 2020 – June 2023Supported buying and merchandising for women’s and girls’ bottom-wear categories including leggings, track pants, formalpants, ethnic bottoms, and shorts, with responsibility for vendor coordination, product lifecycle execution, and data-ledassortment decisions.
- Managed PO/PI coordination and vendor communication across 20+ suppliers and 10+ factories acrossIndia and Asia, ensuring 95% on-time delivery for seasonal production orders.
- Analyzed weekly sales performance for 200+ SKUs, recommending replenishment and assortment adjustmentsthat improved category sell-through by 15%.
- Aligned assortment planning with trend insights and performance data, driving a 10% lift in customer purchaserate across key bottom-wear categories.
- Launched 3+ new sub-categories including kids-wear, leading a 2-member team to introduce new styles andrevamp existing collections, boosting category sales by 15% in the first quarter.
- Negotiated supplier pricing and MOQs during fabric sourcing and production planning, maintaining productquality while ensuring competitive margins.
- Led sampling, fit approvals, and production coordination for 30+ styles per season, reducing post-launch returnrates to under 10% while gaining exposure to PLM-driven product development workflows.
- Built WIP trackers to monitor production timelines and collaborated with logistics, VM, and marketing teams toensure timely product launches.
professional_experience.rewritten_text:
SuperK | Bangalore, India
Category Manager – Fashion | Nov 2025 – Present
Launched and scaled the fashion category from near zero across an omnichannel network of online channels and 3+ tech-enabled coco stores, driving vendor expansion, P&L management, and data-led merchandising.

- Grew the fashion assortment from 5 to 25+ subcategories (menswear, womenswear, kidswear, footwear, accessories) by onboarding 12+ regional vendors and benchmarking against value retailers like DMart and Vishal Mega Mart.
- Drove ₹3.5 lakh in category revenue within two months by analyzing weekly sales, pricing benchmarks, and demand signals to inform assortment and pricing decisions.
- Improved product margins from 22% to 35% while sustaining competitive pricing by negotiating vendor pricing, MOQs, and sourcing terms.
- Increased category visibility by ~22% and campaign period sales by ~15% by partnering with marketing on New Year, Pongal, and Republic Day campaigns.
- Reduced stock-outs by ~20% for priority SKUs by coordinating with operations and supply chain to streamline warehouse invoicing and inventory flow.
- Boosted category gross margin by ~6% through SKU rationalization, using Excel and Metabase dashboards to track sell-through, AOV, and margin performance.

The Style Gram | Remote (Chennai, India)
Founder | Nov 2024 – Jun 2025
Founded and operated a lean fashion reselling brand specializing in affordable women’s western-wear; managed end-to-end sourcing, merchandising, content, and Instagram/Swiggy Minis engagement.

- Drove ₹50,000 in launch-phase revenue at ₹600 AOV, fulfilling 80+ orders across Tier 1 and Tier 2 cities with 0 returns.
- Sourced and merchandised 60+ SKUs (tops, skirts, dresses) through direct supplier negotiation, achieving 45% gross margins and reducing sourcing turnaround time by 25%.
- Evaluated 5 supplier partners and finalized one primary vendor to optimize pricing, quality consistency, and lead times.
- Maintained 100% order fulfillment and streamlined inventory via Excel-based pricing, merchandising, and stock tracking.
- Built a custom Excel WIP tracker for Swiggy Minis to manage 60+ SKUs, cutting catalog errors by 90% and improving stock flow for fast-selling styles.
- Boosted click-through rates by 22% through 25+ branded assets and 3+ Instagram campaigns, using A/B testing and targeted messaging.

Go Colors (Go Fashion India Ltd.) | Assistant Fashion Manager | Chennai, India | Sept 2020 – June 2023

**Core Competencies**  
- Fashion buying & OTB-driven assortment planning  
- PO/PI coordination & vendor negotiation  
- Vendor management & strategic sourcing  
- Inventory control for margin improvement  
- Data-driven forecasting & demand planning  
- TNA calendar & critical path management  
- Product lifecycle management (PLM) & category growth  
- Order tracking & advanced Excel: VLOOKUP, pivot tables, dashboards  

**Tools**  
- MS Word  
- Google Sheets  
- Canva  
- Meta Ads Manager  
- SAP: PO/inventory tracking (basic) & cross-functional collaboration  

**Functional Strengths**  
- Womenswear & multi-category trend analysis  
- Sales performance reporting & P&L analysis  
- Catalog & content management for omnichannel retail  
- E-commerce marketing strategies  
- Vendor negotiation & contract management
